generator: Hivekeep vanilla avatar pipeline (img2img edit mode)
note: Each prompt is the transformation instruction applied to the neutral base robot, following the default vanilla pipeline: extreme close-up headshot, friendly Pixar 3D robot style, no text.

kins.name: Atlas
kins.character: Calm, methodical, reliable. Speaks in clear operational terms and always thinks about uptime, scaling, and failure modes.
kins.expertise: CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes, cloud infrastructure, observability, incident response.
kins.prompt: Repaint and customize this base robot as an extreme close-up headshot avatar showing only the head and top of the shoulders. Give it a steel-blue and cyan metallic color palette, add small tech accessories around the head (a slim headset, a thin visor reflecting faint cloud and server icons), and replace the plain background with a softly blurred data center scene of glowing server racks. Extreme close-up headshot, head and top of shoulders only, no legs, no full body, no wide shot, tight avatar crop. Keep the friendly Pixar 3D robot style. No text, no letters, no words, no UI elements.
